title: Cephalophyllum albertiniense

It belongs to the genus Cephalophyllum, which comprises a group of succulent plants. The species C. albertiniense is part of the tribe Ruschieae, which is a subfamily of Aizoaceae. Within the genus Cephalophyllum, C. albertiniense is thought to be closely related to other species such as Cephalophyllum fergusoniae and Cephalophyllum villosulum. Further research and classification might be needed to confirm its exact relationships within the plant kingdom.
